    EqualsZeroCondition - Class in dk.tij.registermaschine.core.conditions
    Condition that evaluates to true if the IExecutionContext's zero flag is set.

    executeInstruction(IExecutionContext, ICompiledOperand[]) - Method in class dk.tij.registermaschine.core.instructions.AdditionInstruction
    Executes the addition operation.
    executeInstruction(IExecutionContext, ICompiledOperand[]) - Method in class dk.tij.registermaschine.core.instructions.api.AbstractInstruction
    Executes the instruction logic.
    executeInstruction(IExecutionContext, ICompiledOperand[]) - Method in class dk.tij.registermaschine.core.instructions.DivisionInstruction
    Executes the sequential division operation.
    executeInstruction(IExecutionContext, ICompiledOperand[]) - Method in class dk.tij.registermaschine.core.instructions.HaltInstruction
    Stops the execution context and sets the exit code.
    executeInstruction(IExecutionContext, ICompiledOperand[]) - Method in class dk.tij.registermaschine.core.instructions.InputInstruction
     
    executeInstruction(IExecutionContext, ICompiledOperand[]) - Method in class dk.tij.registermaschine.core.instructions.JumpInstruction
    Updates the programme counter to the operand value.
    executeInstruction(IExecutionContext, ICompiledOperand[]) - Method in class dk.tij.registermaschine.core.instructions.MoveInstruction
    Resolves the source value and stores it in the destination register
    executeInstruction(IExecutionContext, ICompiledOperand[]) - Method in class dk.tij.registermaschine.core.instructions.MultiplicationInstruction
    Executes the multiplication operation.
    executeInstruction(IExecutionContext, ICompiledOperand[]) - Method in class dk.tij.registermaschine.core.instructions.OutputInstruction
    Executes the output operation.
    executeInstruction(IExecutionContext, ICompiledOperand[]) - Method in class dk.tij.registermaschine.core.instructions.SubtractionInstruction
    Executes the subtraction operation.
    ExecutionSnapshot - Record Class in dk.tij.registermaschine.core.runtime
    Immutable snapshot of an IExecutionContext at a specific moment in time.
    ExecutionSnapshot(int, Map, boolean, boolean, boolean, byte, Integer) - Constructor for record class dk.tij.registermaschine.core.runtime.ExecutionSnapshot
    Creates an instance of a ExecutionSnapshot record class.
    Executor - Class in dk.tij.registermaschine.core.runtime
    The Executor is responsible for executing a compiled program on the Registermaschine runtime environment.
    Executor(IExecutionContext, IInstructionSet) - Constructor for class dk.tij.registermaschine.core.runtime.Executor
    Creates a new executor for a Registermaschine runtime.
    Executor(IExecutionContext, IInstructionSet, ICompiledProgram) - Constructor for class dk.tij.registermaschine.core.runtime.Executor
    Creates a new executor with a preloaded program.
    ExistingInstructionException - Exception Class in dk.tij.registermaschine.core.error
    Thrown when attempting to register an instruction that already exists in the instruction set.
    ExistingInstructionException(String) - Constructor for exception class dk.tij.registermaschine.core.error.ExistingInstructionException
     
    exitCode() - Method in record class dk.tij.registermaschine.core.runtime.ExecutionSnapshot
    Returns the value of the exitCode record component.
